content.full_text:
January 22, 1993

Fair Political Practices Committee
428 J Street
Suite 800
Sacramento, California
Att: Legal Division

RE: Political Reform Act 89510-89519

To Whom It May Concern:

I am writing to request a formal written advise regarding the dissolution of campaign funds.

Having decided not to run for re-election to the Board of Education in 1993, there will be a surplus in my campaign fund. I understand that, pursuant to sections 89510-89519 of the Political Reform Act, there are several options available to me.

Please direct your response to me & the Committee to Re-Elect Roberta Weintraub, P.O. Box 17375, Encino, CA. 91416-7375,
Att: Beverly Korbin. I would appreciate your response as soon as possible.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Roberta Weintraub

RLW/bvk
Dictated but not read
